title: InsightDash: Dashboard render timeout on large datasets
description: Users report timeout errors when loading dashboards with >1M rows. Need to implement query pagination and lazy loading.

title: InsightDash: Add drill-down filter support
description: Product requirement to support multi-level drill-down filters on all chart types.

title: InsightDash: Fix broken CSV export for pivot tables
description: Pivot table exports produce malformed CSV when column headers contain commas.

title: InsightDash: Role-based dashboard sharing
description: Implement RBAC so dashboards can be shared with viewer/editor permissions.

title: InsightDash: Embed API for third-party portals
description: Build a JS embed SDK so customers can embed dashboards into external portals.

title: InsightDash: Dark mode UI implementation
description: Implement system-level dark mode toggle across all dashboard components.

title: InsightDash: Custom date range picker component
description: Replace third-party date picker with in-house component supporting fiscal calendars.

title: InsightDash: Widget library upgrade to React 18
description: Migrate InsightDash frontend from React 17 to React 18 concurrent rendering model.

title: InsightDash: Unit test coverage below 60%
description: Engineering audit revealed unit test coverage at 54%. Target is 80% before Q2 release.

title: InsightDash: SSO integration with Okta
description: Integrate Okta SAML 2.0 for enterprise SSO login on InsightDash.

title: InsightDash: Accessibility audit and WCAG 2.1 fixes
description: A11y audit flagged 23 violations. Fix contrast ratios, ARIA labels, and keyboard nav.

title: InsightDash: Alert threshold notification system
description: Allow users to set threshold alerts on KPI widgets with email/Slack notifications.

title: InsightDash: Cache layer for repeated dashboard queries
description: Add Redis caching for dashboard queries that repeat within a 5-min window.

title: InsightDash: API rate limiting for embed endpoints
description: Embed API endpoints lack rate limiting, causing abuse risk in multi-tenant environments.

title: InsightDash: Localization support for EU markets
description: Add i18n support for German, French, and Spanish locales across the dashboard UI.

title: InsightDash: Semantic layer for calculated metrics
description: Build a semantic layer allowing analysts to define reusable calculated metrics in YAML.

title: InsightDash: Optimize slow-running aggregation queries
description: Several aggregation queries on the InsightDash metrics store take >30s. Profile and optimize.

title: InsightDash: Data freshness indicators on widgets
description: Show last-refreshed timestamp and staleness warning on each dashboard widget.

title: InsightDash: Integrate dbt models into metric catalog
description: Surface dbt model lineage and documentation inside InsightDash metric explorer.

title: InsightDash: Data anomaly detection alerts
description: Use statistical models to flag anomalies in time-series KPIs and surface them in dashboards.

title: StreamAPI: Kafka consumer lag monitoring dashboard
description: Build internal observability dashboard showing per-topic Kafka consumer lag in real time.

title: StreamAPI: Websocket connection stability under load
description: Websocket connections drop at >5000 concurrent clients. Investigate and fix connection pool.

title: StreamAPI: Add gRPC endpoint support
description: Customers requesting gRPC as an alternative transport layer alongside REST and Websocket.

title: StreamAPI: JWT token refresh without re-authentication
description: Implement silent JWT refresh so streaming sessions don't drop on token expiry.

title: StreamAPI: Dead letter queue for failed event deliveries
description: Add DLQ support so failed event deliveries can be replayed without data loss.

title: StreamAPI: Schema registry integration with Confluent
description: Integrate Confluent Schema Registry for Avro/Protobuf schema validation on ingest.

title: StreamAPI: Multi-region event routing
description: Route events to nearest regional endpoint to reduce latency for global customers.

title: StreamAPI: Rate limiting per API key
description: Enforce per-key rate limits (requests/sec) with 429 responses and retry-after headers.

title: StreamAPI: Replay API for historical event streams
description: Allow clients to replay events from a specified timestamp up to 72 hours back.

title: StreamAPI: OpenAPI 3.1 spec generation automation
description: Auto-generate and publish OpenAPI 3.1 spec from code annotations on every release.

title: StreamAPI: Event filtering by payload attributes
description: Allow subscribers to define JSONPath filter expressions to receive only matching events.

title: StreamAPI: Integration test suite for Kafka pipelines
description: Build automated integration test suite covering Kafka produce/consume across all topics.

title: StreamAPI: Deprecate v1 REST endpoints
description: Sunset legacy v1 REST endpoints after migration of all customers to v2.

title: StreamAPI: Backpressure handling for slow consumers
description: Implement backpressure signals so slow consumers don't overwhelm the broker.

title: StreamAPI: Add HMAC signature validation on webhook delivery
description: Validate HMAC-SHA256 signatures on all outbound webhook payloads for security.

title: StreamAPI: Kubernetes HPA tuning for broker pods
description: Auto-scaling thresholds for Kafka broker pods are misconfigured causing under-provisioning at peak.

title: StreamAPI: Terraform module for multi-region deployment
description: Create reusable Terraform modules to provision StreamAPI infrastructure across AWS regions.

title: StreamAPI: Prometheus alerting rules for event lag
description: Define and deploy Prometheus alerting rules for consumer lag thresholds across all topics.

title: StreamAPI: CI/CD pipeline for schema registry updates
description: Automate schema registry deployments via GitHub Actions with rollback support.

title: StreamAPI: mTLS enforcement between broker and consumers
description: Enable mutual TLS on all internal broker-to-consumer communication paths.

title: DataLake Pro: Snowflake cost optimization audit
description: Monthly Snowflake spend exceeded budget by 40%. Audit warehouse sizing and query patterns.

title: DataLake Pro: Implement data retention policies
description: Define and enforce automated data retention/deletion policies per table per regulatory requirement.

title: DataLake Pro: Build ingestion connector for Salesforce
description: Create a native Salesforce CRM ingestion connector with incremental sync support.

title: DataLake Pro: Column-level encryption for PII fields
description: Apply AES-256 encryption to PII columns (email, phone, SSN) at rest in the warehouse.

title: DataLake Pro: Partition pruning for event log tables
description: Event log tables lack partitioning, causing full table scans. Add date-based partitioning.

title: DataLake Pro: Data catalog integration with Apache Atlas
description: Integrate Apache Atlas for data lineage tracking and metadata cataloging in DataLake Pro.

title: DataLake Pro: Automated data quality checks with Great Expectations
description: Implement Great Expectations suite for automated data quality validation on all ingestion pipelines.

title: DataLake Pro: Delta Lake migration for mutable tables
description: Migrate mutable staging tables from Parquet to Delta Lake format for ACID compliance.

title: DataLake Pro: Self-serve data access request portal
description: Build a UI for analysts to request access to datasets, with manager approval workflow.

title: DataLake Pro: SLA monitoring for ingestion pipelines
description: Track and alert on ingestion pipeline SLA breaches (e.g., data late by >2 hours).

title: DataLake Pro: Cross-region data replication for DR
description: Set up cross-region replication of critical datasets to support disaster recovery objectives.

title: DataLake Pro: GDPR right-to-erasure automation
description: Build automated pipeline to handle GDPR deletion requests across all DataLake Pro tables.

title: DataLake Pro: Benchmark ingestion throughput
description: Run throughput benchmarks on ingestion connectors and document baseline performance metrics.

title: DataLake Pro: Add support for Apache Iceberg tables
description: Evaluate and implement Apache Iceberg as an alternative open table format for DataLake Pro.

title: DataLake Pro: Monitoring dashboard for pipeline health
description: Create a DataLake Pro ops dashboard showing pipeline run status, failures, and latency.

title: DataLake Pro: Airflow DAG deployment automation
description: Automate Airflow DAG deployment via CI/CD pipeline with environment promotion gates.

title: DataLake Pro: S3 lifecycle policies for raw data tier
description: Configure S3 intelligent tiering and lifecycle rules for raw data bucket cost reduction.

title: DataLake Pro: Terraform state management refactor
description: Migrate Terraform state files to remote S3 backend with state locking via DynamoDB.

title: DataLake Pro: Snowflake network policy enforcement
description: Enforce IP allowlist network policies on all Snowflake accounts via Terraform.

title: DataLake Pro: Alert on Airflow task failures in PagerDuty
description: Route Airflow task failure alerts to PagerDuty with on-call escalation policies.

title: HR: Build onboarding checklist automation
description: Automate new hire onboarding checklist delivery via Slack bot triggered from HRIS.

title: HR: Headcount planning dashboard in InsightDash
description: Build a headcount planning dashboard showing open roles, attrition, and hiring pipeline.

title: Product: Competitive benchmarking report for InsightDash
description: Research and document feature gaps vs. Tableau, Looker, and Power BI for Q3 roadmap planning.

title: Product: StreamAPI developer portal revamp
description: Redesign the StreamAPI developer portal with improved docs, sandbox, and code samples.

title: Product: DataLake Pro pricing page redesign
description: Redesign DataLake Pro pricing page to reflect new tier structure (Starter, Growth, Enterprise).

title: Cross-team: Unified authentication service across all products
description: Build a shared auth microservice (OAuth 2.0 + OIDC) used by InsightDash, StreamAPI, and DataLake Pro.

title: Cross-team: Shared observability stack (Grafana + Prometheus)
description: Deploy a unified Grafana/Prometheus stack serving all three products with shared alerting policies.

title: Cross-team: Centralized logging with OpenSearch
description: Aggregate logs from InsightDash, StreamAPI, and DataLake Pro into a single OpenSearch cluster.

title: Cross-product: End-to-end latency audit across Kafka → Snowflake → InsightDash pipeline
description: Measure and optimize end-to-end event latency from StreamAPI Kafka ingestion through DataLake Pro Snowflake transformation to InsightDash dashboard render. Target: <10s P99 latency.
dependencies: Blocked by TECH-34; Blocked by TECH-45

title: Cross-product: Shared customer usage analytics pipeline
description: Build a unified pipeline ingesting usage events from all three products into DataLake Pro for cross-product analytics in InsightDash.

title: Cross-product: Unified feature flag service (LaunchDarkly)
description: Integrate LaunchDarkly as the single feature flag platform across InsightDash, StreamAPI, and DataLake Pro.

title: Cross-team: Security penetration test across all products
description: Commission external pen test covering auth, API endpoints, and data access controls across all three products.
dependencies: Blocked by TECH-66; Blocked by TECH-40; Blocked by TECH-44

title: StreamAPI: SDK client libraries for Python and Go
description: Publish official Python and Go client SDKs for StreamAPI with auto-generated code from OpenAPI spec.

title: DataLake Pro: Row-level security in Snowflake
description: Implement row-level security policies in Snowflake to enforce data access by customer tenant.

title: InsightDash: Mobile-responsive dashboard layouts
description: Ensure all InsightDash dashboard templates render correctly on tablet and mobile screen sizes.
